title: Multiple failed logins followed by success
description: Three or more failed console logins were followed by a successful login.
recommended_action: Verify with the user, review login history, reset password if unauthorized, and enforce MFA.

title: New IAM access key created
description: A new long-term IAM access key was created.
recommended_action: Confirm whether the access key was approved. Disable and rotate the key if suspicious.

title: Possible IAM privilege escalation
description: Risky IAM permission change detected: AttachUserPolicy
recommended_action: Review IAM permission change, check actor activity, and remove unauthorized privileges.

title: CloudTrail logging modified or disabled
recommended_action: Immediately verify CloudTrail status, re-enable logging, and investigate the actor.
